semantic.role: Version constant definitions and type guard for ArchSpine protocol schema versions.
responsibilities: Defines the SchemaVersion type as a semantic versioning string template literal.
Exports the current package version string ('1.0.0') for external use.
Exports the current schema version constant used across the protocol.
Exports the current config schema version constant for configuration validation.
Exports a generator version string combining package name and version.
Provides a type guard function to verify if an unknown value equals the current config schema version.
outOfScope: Does not handle version migration or compatibility checks between different schema versions.
Does not enforce schema version format beyond the type template literal.
invariants: SchemaVersion must always be a string in the format `<major>.<minor>.<patch>`.
The config schema version is fixed to CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION; only exact matches are considered supported.
The rule 'interface-prefix' is not applicable as no interfaces are defined in this file.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize all version constants and schema version validation in a single module to ensure consistency across the ArchSpine codebase and protocol.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era; this file is part of the initial release establishing the versioning foundation.

publicSurface.description: Type alias for a semantic version string template literal. Used throughout the codebase to type-check schema versions.
The current release version of the ArchSpine package. Used for display and build metadata.
The current schema version of the ArchSpine manifest and protocol. Used to validate serialized data compatibility.
The current config schema version for .spine/config.json files. Used to determine if a config file is supported.
A generator identifier string in the form 'archspine/<version>'. Used in generated output to mark its origin.
Type guard that checks whether an unknown value equals the current config schema version. Returns true only for exact matches.
